name: espn_injury_id
description: ESPN injury record ID — primary deduplication key per snapshot (may be negative string)

name: game_date
description: Date the scraper ran (partition key); used to scope status-change queries to a single game day

name: scraped_at
description: UTC timestamp when this snapshot was collected — together with espn_injury_id enables GTD→Out change detection across hourly runs

name: player_name
description: Player full display name from ESPN athlete.displayName

name: team_name
description: Team display name from the top-level injury object (e.g. 'Atlanta Hawks')

name: fantasy_status
description: Fantasy abbreviation from details.fantasyStatus.abbreviation — key field for status-change detection (GTD, OUT, O, Q, IR, etc.)

name: short_comment
description: Short narrative snippet about the injury (1-2 sentences)

name: long_comment
description: Full narrative text for the injury report

name: reported_at
description: UTC timestamp when ESPN originally published this injury report entry (from injury object date field)

name: return_date
description: Projected return date from details.returnDate, if present (YYYY-MM-DD)

name: source_file_path
description: GCS path of the source JSON file written by the scraper
